summary: Phase 2 (CRM, Goals, Compliance) and Phase 3 (AI Advisor, Portfolio Aggregator) fully tested. Fixed critical bug in AI advice endpoint (MongoDB _id: null causing duplicate key error). All 33 backend API tests pass (100%). All 4 new frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements and navigation.
passed_tests: GET /api/crm/households - Returns 200 with 3 sample households
GET /api/crm/households/{id} - Returns specific household with members
GET /api/crm/tasks - Returns task list with required fields
POST /api/crm/tasks - Creates new task successfully
GET /api/crm/meetings - Returns meetings with required fields
GET /api/crm/notes/{household_id} - Returns notes for household
POST /api/crm/notes - Creates new note successfully
GET /api/goals/hh_wheeler001 - Returns 4 goals with progress_percent
Goals include retirement, education, house, emergency types
POST /api/goals - Creates new goal successfully
POST /api/ai/generate-advice - Returns AI recommendations (FIXED)
AI advice has recommendations with rank, title, description, impact, confidence
AI advice has analysis with key_strengths and areas_for_improvement
AI advice has retirement_outlook with success_probability
AI advice has disclaimers array
AI advice has llm_metadata with confidence_score
GET /api/ai/advice-history/{household_id} - Returns advice history
GET /api/portfolio/aggregated/hh_wheeler001 - Returns 9 connected accounts
Portfolio has total_assets, total_liabilities, net_worth
Accounts include bank, super, brokerage, mortgage types
Portfolio has asset_allocation breakdown
Portfolio has monthly_snapshot with income, expenses, savings
POST /api/portfolio/sync/{household_id} - Syncs all accounts
GET /api/compliance/audit-log - Returns audit entries
GET /api/compliance/risk-assessment/{household_id} - Returns risk assessment
GET /api/advice/records - Returns advice records
Client CRM page loads at /client-crm with 3 households
Client CRM - Summary cards (Total Clients, Total AUM, Pending Tasks, Upcoming Meetings)
Client CRM - New Task and New Client buttons visible
Client CRM - Search clients input visible
Client CRM - Household detail tabs (Overview, Notes, Tasks)
Goal Tracker page loads at /goal-tracker
Goal Tracker - Summary cards (Total Goals, Total Target, Current Progress, Goals On Track)
Goal Tracker - Add Goal button visible
Goal Tracker - Overall Progress section visible
AI Advisor page loads at /ai-advisor
AI Advisor - Multi-LLM Powered badge visible
AI Advisor - Ask AI and History tabs visible
AI Advisor - Question input and Get AI Advice button visible
AI Advisor - Quick Questions buttons visible
AI Advisor - Generates AI Analysis with 89% confidence
AI Advisor - Shows Key Strengths, Areas to Improve, Retirement Outlook
AI Advisor - Shows AI Recommendations with confidence scores
Portfolio Aggregator page loads at /portfolio-aggregator
Portfolio Aggregator - Summary cards (Total Assets $2.92M, Liabilities, Net Worth, 9 Connected Accounts)
Portfolio Aggregator - Connect Account and Sync All buttons visible
Portfolio Aggregator - Overview, Accounts, Allocation tabs visible
Navigation - Goal Tracker link visible in sidebar
Navigation - AI Advisor link visible in sidebar
Navigation - Portfolio Aggregator link visible in sidebar
Navigation - Decision Engine link visible in sidebar
Navigation - Life Timeline link visible in sidebar

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB duplicate key error when storing AI advice
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed from {**ai_response, '_id': None} to excluding _id field before insert

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up (TEST_ prefixed goals, tasks, notes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 and Phase 3 fully tested. Client CRM at /client-crm shows 3 households (Wheeler, Chen, Patel) with tasks and meetings. Goal Tracker at /goal-tracker shows 4 goals (retirement, education, house, emergency) with progress. AI Advisor at /ai-advisor generates mock AI recommendations with confidence scores - uses MOCKED LLM responses. Portfolio Aggregator at /portfolio-aggregator shows 9 connected accounts with asset allocation - uses MOCKED Open Banking data. Compliance modal appears on first visit - set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass.

features: Summary cards (Total Clients, AUM, Tasks, Meetings)
New Task and New Client buttons
Key Strengths and Areas to Improve
AI Recommendations with rank and confidence
Connect Account and Sync All buttons

mocked_apis_confirmed: AI advice generation - Returns mock LLM recommendations (in production would call actual LLMs)
Open Banking portfolio data - Returns mock account data (in production would use Open Banking APIs)
Authentication - Compliance modal on first visit
